news.t: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs

holdings.infoBox: MVPA is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are Crocs stock at 7.51%, Crescent Energy Company at 6.88%, Bread Financial Holdings at 5.72%, United Parcel Service at 5.47%, and Bloomin' Brands at 5.24%.

overview.description: The Miller Value Partners Appreciation ETF (MVPA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through investments in a narrow portfolio of global stocks of any market capitalization. MVPA was launched on Jan 30, 2024 and is issued by Miller.

data.title: From Coke to GM: Decode the Q1 Earnings Wave Through ETFs
data.text: While the markets are generally fixated on what the Magnificent Seven is doing in terms of first-quarter earnings, there are other names investors may want to track. This morning's earnings bonanza wa...

data.title: Miller Value Partners CIO on ETF MVPA Outperforming the Market
data.text: Miller Value Partners CIO and Portfolio Manager Bill Miller IV discusses the Miller Value Partners Appreciation ETF (Ticker: MVPA) with Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ."
